user: How do we change that so Intervals has the power? And uses it?

Two things need to be set in Intervals.icu (web UI only — no API for sport settings):

*Settings → Sports → Run:*

Your easy run averaged 416W, so threshold is probably around *340–360W* — but that's a guess. Best to run a 20-min all-out effort and use 95% of average power, or use the Garmin Running Power test protocol.

2. *Power field* — currently null. Garmin stores running power in a developer data field (not the standard cycling power field). Intervals.icu may or may not auto-detect it — worth checking if power shows up once FTP is set.

Once running FTP is set, Intervals will use power for TSS and zone time-in-zone on all future runs (and can recalculate past ones).
